title: Debugging Asynchronous Code Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on debugging async JavaScript.

questions.question: Regarding the development of software, what is an 'Asynchronous Bug'?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
An error that occurs during the execution of a task that does not complete immediately, such as fetching data from an API

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a asynchronous-bug-debugging workflow?
options: Narrowing down the specific async task—such as a network request—where the failure is occurring
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
